title: Fin's ABC & Number Lore Mod
description: My Minecraft adaptation of the show Alphabet Lore by Mike Salcedo.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46bd100f5fd93c07a21feec78979d80cb33531a2.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/dRhmRonWtow" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This is my Minecraft adaptation of the show Alphabet Lore (originally created by Mike Salcedo).

# **Number Objectives**

- Fly up to Planet Zero to go to Zero's dimension
- Locate the Calculator Ship
- Mine Zeroite Ore
- Trade with One to get "1" Tokens
- Use the Number Crafter to create other numbers
- Tameable Numbers


# **Letter Objectives**

- Find Planet Z 

Path 1:

- Catch N with a lead
- Bring N to F, this will allow you to tame F

Path 2:
- Find F in the F cave and defeat him
- Craft armor using F goop ? gem and Zee crystal

EXTRA:
Give L M N O P ores that will allow you to tame them in super form
